✦ Chapter 1 — The Origin Story

You have just landed on
Haraks's world.

Somewhere in the world, a girl is simultaneously training a deep learning model, editing campus event videos, and mentally rewriting her LinkedIn bio to sound more like herself. That is Haraks Kaur Duggal — 3rd year B.Tech CSE student at Amity University, with a minor at IIT Mandi. A researcher by day, creative by night, and quietly building something big the entire time.

✦ Chapter 2 — The Lab

She walked into
IIT Ropar
and built something.

Summer 2025. Haraks lands a research internship at IIT Ropar. Her mission: build ML pipelines to understand agriculture through sound and sight. She processed over 1,000 audio samples, extracted Mel Spectrograms, trained CNNs, and pushed model accuracy to ~85% under real-world noisy conditions. The research was selected for Ministry-level review.

~85%Classification Accuracy
1000+Audio Samples
🏛️Ministry Review
Jun 2025
Research Intern · IIT Ropar
Agricultural ML Research
Designed end-to-end ML pipelines using audio and image data. Performed feature extraction including Mel Spectrograms. Trained and compared CNN architectures for classification under noisy real-world conditions.
Aug 2025
Research submitted for Ministry-level review
Python · PyTorch · TensorFlow · Librosa · OpenCV
2 / 5
✦ Chapter 3 — The Builder

She does not just study.
She ships.

Three projects, three wildly different domains — bees, YouTube, and your dinner plate. Each one a full system built from scratch, because Haraks does not do halfway.

01
🐝 Bee Audio Analysis
Jun to Aug 2025 · Machine Learning
End-to-end bioacoustic ML system for bee health monitoring. Mel Spectrogram extraction paired with CNN training and noise robustness testing. Bees matter, and the model learned that.
PythonCNNLibrosaPyTorch
02
🎬 YouTube Transcriber & Translator
Apr 2025 · NLP
Full NLP pipeline using OpenAI Whisper for speech recognition with timestamp alignment, multilingual translation, and automated PDF report generation. Watch a video in Hindi, get a PDF in English.
WhisperNLPPythonPDF Gen
03
🥗 Personalized Diet Recommender
Apr to May 2025 · Rule-based AI
Rule-based recommendation system for personalized diet planning with intelligent filtering and preprocessing for wellness-focused output. Your nutrition, made algorithmic.
PythonMLPandasNumPy

✦ Chapter 5 — Beyond the Code

She is also just
really doing it
in real life.

Haraks is not just building in a lab. She is the Student Representative for Amity University Punjab, winning debate competitions at Plaksha University, heading AIESEC marketing recruitment, running social media and leading events across clubs in Amity, representing Switzerland in MUN, and shooting the campus moments everyone remembers. The creative work and the technical work come from exactly the same instinct.

🎓
Student Representative
Officially representing Amity University Punjab at the student level — a role that takes presence, trust and real accountability.
🎤
Amiphoria — Core Team
Social media and marketing lead for Amity's flagship university fest — one of the largest-scale student-run events in the region.
🏆
1st Prize — Debate at Plaksha
Inter-college winner at Plaksha University. The kind of win that comes from research, conviction and knowing how to hold a room.
🌍
AIESEC — Three Roles
OGV Member, Graphic Designer on the iComm branding team, and VP of Marketing Recruitment — led a full 6 to 7 week recruitment strategy from end to end.
💡
Smart India Hackathon
Internal round winner at SIH. Took a real problem, built a real solution, and made it past the cut at one of India's biggest tech competitions.
📷
Photographer & Event Lead
Covering campus life across clubs in Amity as photographer and videographer. Led events like Comic Con and Book Hunt with full ownership, not just participation.
🌐
MUN — Switzerland Delegate
Representing Switzerland at UNCSW. Research, public speaking, geopolitics and diplomacy all in one room, under pressure.
🧩
BizQuest & Social Media
Competing in business and technology quizzes while running real social media strategy as Social Media Manager across Amity clubs.
"Building a powerful, intelligent, and aesthetic version of myself — quietly, but intentionally."
